testcase.name: testBestMove(String, List, Integer)[1]

20:00:27.925 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 20:00:28.103 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 20:00:28.143 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.tuning.EngineTuningBootstrap -- Loaded 1 tuning configurations from classpath:tuning/seed-tunings.yaml 20:00:28.188 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.tuning.EngineTuningBootstrap -- Applied engine tuning "v3.8.2-v3f_bishopAtk9" from classpath:tuning/seed-tunings.yaml (1 configurations available). 20:00:29.757 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.OpeningBookLoader -- Loaded opening book from cache (360 entries) 20:00:29.783 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.OpeningBook -- Opening book initialised with 131 unique positions (cache hit) 20:00:29.808 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.SearchConcurrencyPlanner -- Search concurrency plan: availableProcessors=24, searchThreads=16 (user), lazySmpThreads=8 (user), rootParallelLimit=72 (user), ttMb=256 (user) 20:00:29.904 [main] INFO julius.game.chessengine.ai.AI -- ### SearchThreads = 16, LazySmpThreads = 8
=== Engine decision statistics === FEN: 3R4/8/P4pk1/rP4p1/8/8/1K6/8 w - - 3 65 Side to move: White Expected best moves: [Kc1, Kc2, Kc3] Baseline evaluation: +1.24 pawns Search configuration: runtimeCores=24, searchThreads=16, lazySmpThreads=8, rootParallelLimit=72, ttSize=256 MB, multiThreaded=yes Depth target: 8, deepest completed iteration: 8 Chosen move: Kc3 -> +1.34 pawns (Δ vs baseline: +0.10) [rank #3] Engine top move: Rd7 -> +2.15 pawns (Δ vs chosen: -0.07) Nodes visited: 601615, null-move prunes: 12205, search duration: 3512 ms Top candidates by evaluation: 1. Rd7 -> +2.15 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.81) 2. Rh8 -> +2.11 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.77) 3. Kc3 -> +2.08 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.74) 4. Kc2 -> +2.07 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.73) 5. Kc1 -> +1.91 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.57) Expected move evaluations: Kc1 -> +1.91 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.57) Kc2 -> +2.07 pawns (Δ vs chosen: +0.73) Kc3 -> +2.08 pawns Evaluation delta vs engine best: -0.07 pawns Principal variation: Rd5 (+0.94 pawns) ==================================
